nasb.text: Therefore God gave them over in the lusts of their hearts to impurity, so that their bodies would be dishonored among them.

esv.text: Therefore God gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to impurity, to the dishonoring of their bodies among themselves,

cnv.text: 因此，　神就任憑他們順著心中的私慾去作污穢的事，以致羞辱自己的身體。

ccb.text: 因此，上帝任凭他们随从内心的情欲行污秽的事，玷污彼此的身体。

csbs.text: 因此，神任凭他们顺着心中的情欲去做污秽的事，以致彼此玷污自己的身体。
